effective_instructions.statement: For nth-to-default (NTD) Monte Carlo pricing, use GaussianCopula.sample_default_times() from trellis.models.copulas.gaussian — do NOT use MonteCarloEngine. MonteCarloEngine requires an SDE process and is for equity/rate path simulation.

effective_instructions.statement: Do not route CDS/NTD through Black76, equity GBM option logic, or a generic vanilla path kernel.
effective_instructions.title: Route note 5

effective_instructions.rationale: Route notes are retained as structured guidance and resolved by precedence.
effective_instructions.statement: NTD copula pattern: T=year_fraction(...); lam=market_state.credit_curve.hazard_rate(T); hazard_rates=np.full(n_names, lam); corr=np.full((n,n), correlation); np.fill_diagonal(corr,1.0); copula=GaussianCopula(corr); default_times=copula.sample_default_times(hazard_rates, 50000, rng); triggered=np.sum(default_times<=T,axis=1)>=n_th; return float(np.mean(triggered))*(1-recovery)*notional*df
effective_instructions.title: Route note 2

effective_instructions.rationale: Route notes are retained as structured guidance and resolved by precedence.

## Structured Route Card
- Method family: `monte_carlo`
- Instrument type: `nth_to_default`
- Route: `credit_default_swap_monte_carlo`
- Engine family: `monte_carlo`
- Route family: `credit_default_swap`
- Required primitives:
  - `trellis.core.date_utils.generate_schedule` (schedule_builder)
  - `trellis.core.date_utils.year_fraction` (time_measure)
  - `trellis.core.differentiable.get_numpy` (array_backend)
  - `trellis.models.copulas.gaussian.GaussianCopula` (default_time_sampler)
  - `trellis.models.monte_carlo.engine.MonteCarloEngine` (path_simulation)
- Resolved instructions:
  - [route_hint] Use `trellis.core.date_utils.generate_schedule` to build ordered dates before pricing.
  - [route_hint] Do not hard-code observation or payment grids inside the payoff body.
  - [route_hint] For nth-to-default (NTD) Monte Carlo pricing, use GaussianCopula.sample_default_times() from trellis.models.copulas.gaussian — do NOT use MonteCarloEngine. MonteCarloEngine requires an SDE process and is for equity/rate path simulation.
  - [route_hint] Do not route CDS/NTD through Black76, equity GBM option logic, or a generic vanilla path kernel.
  - [historical_note] NTD copula pattern: T=year_fraction(...); lam=market_state.credit_curve.hazard_rate(T); hazard_rates=np.full(n_names, lam); corr=np.full((n,n), correlation); np.fill_diagonal(corr,1.0); copula=GaussianCopula(corr); default_times=copula.sample_default_times(hazard_rates, 50000, rng); triggered=np.sum(default_times<=T,axis=1)>=n_th; return float(np.mean(triggered))*(1-recovery)*notional*df
  - [historical_note] Use `market_state.discount.discount(t)` directly for discount factor. Use `market_state.credit_curve.hazard_rate(T)` for hazard rate.
  - [historical_note] The requirements property must return {'discount', 'credit'} — NOT 'credit_curve' or 'discount_curve'.
  - [historical_note] generate_schedule is NOT required for NTD copula MC — use year_fraction(settlement, end_date, day_count) to get a single maturity T.
- Schedule construction:
  - [route_hint] Use `trellis.core.date_utils.generate_schedule` to build ordered dates before pricing.
  - [route_hint] Do not hard-code observation or payment grids inside the payoff body.
  - [historical_note] generate_schedule is NOT required for NTD copula MC — use year_fraction(settlement, end_date, day_count) to get a single maturity T.
- Required adapters:
  - `use_credit_curve_hazard_rate_or_survival_probability`
  - `declare_credit_curve_and_discount_curve_requirements`
- Primary modules to inspect/reuse:
  - `trellis.models.monte_carlo.engine`
- Post-build test targets:
  - `tests/test_agent/test_build_loop.py`
- Instruction precedence: follow the approved modules, primitives, and route helper in this card. If older guidance conflicts, treat it as stale and obey this plan.
- Use approved Trellis imports only. Prefer thin adapters over bespoke numerical kernels.

- Primitive route:
  - Route: `credit_default_swap_monte_carlo`
  - Engine family: `monte_carlo`
  - Route family: `credit_default_swap`
  - Route score: `4.50`
  - Selected primitives:
    - `trellis.core.date_utils.generate_schedule` (schedule_builder)
    - `trellis.core.date_utils.year_fraction` (time_measure)
    - `trellis.core.differentiable.get_numpy` (array_backend)
    - `trellis.models.copulas.gaussian.GaussianCopula` (default_time_sampler)
    - `trellis.models.monte_carlo.engine.MonteCarloEngine` (path_simulation)
  - Resolved instructions:
    - [route_hint] Use `trellis.core.date_utils.generate_schedule` to build ordered dates before pricing.
    - [route_hint] Do not hard-code observation or payment grids inside the payoff body.
    - [route_hint] For nth-to-default (NTD) Monte Carlo pricing, use GaussianCopula.sample_default_times() from trellis.models.copulas.gaussian — do NOT use MonteCarloEngine. MonteCarloEngine requires an SDE process and is for equity/rate path simulation.
    - [route_hint] Do not route CDS/NTD through Black76, equity GBM option logic, or a generic vanilla path kernel.
    - [historical_note] NTD copula pattern: T=year_fraction(...); lam=market_state.credit_curve.hazard_rate(T); hazard_rates=np.full(n_names, lam); corr=np.full((n,n), correlation); np.fill_diagonal(corr,1.0); copula=GaussianCopula(corr); default_times=copula.sample_default_times(hazard_rates, 50000, rng); triggered=np.sum(default_times<=T,axis=1)>=n_th; return float(np.mean(triggered))*(1-recovery)*notional*df
    - [historical_note] Use `market_state.discount.discount(t)` directly for discount factor. Use `market_state.credit_curve.hazard_rate(T)` for hazard rate.
    - [historical_note] The requirements property must return {'discount', 'credit'} — NOT 'credit_curve' or 'discount_curve'.
    - [historical_note] generate_schedule is NOT required for NTD copula MC — use year_fraction(settlement, end_date, day_count) to get a single maturity T.
  - Schedule construction:
    - [route_hint] Use `trellis.core.date_utils.generate_schedule` to build ordered dates before pricing.
    - [route_hint] Do not hard-code observation or payment grids inside the payoff body.
    - [historical_note] generate_schedule is NOT required for NTD copula MC — use year_fraction(settlement, end_date, day_count) to get a single maturity T.
  - Required adapters:
    - `use_credit_curve_hazard_rate_or_survival_probability`
    - `declare_credit_curve_and_discount_curve_requirements`
  - Instruction precedence: follow the approved modules, primitives, and route helper in this plan. If older guidance conflicts, treat it as stale and obey this plan.
- Every `trellis.*` import in the generated code MUST come from the approved module list above.
- If you need functionality outside the approved list, say so explicitly instead of inventing an import.
